evals.prompt: Mình vừa mua gói Gold và điền API key nhưng code vẫn báo là đang dùng bản Community, tại sao vậy?
evals.expected_output: Agent explains the difference between vnstock and vnstock_data, and offers to run the AST migration script.

assertions.name: AST Migration Proposal
assertions.description: Ensures the agent proposes using migrate_to_sponsor instead of regex/sed.

evals.prompt: Tôi có một thư mục code dùng vnstock cũ, giờ muốn chuyển qua vnstock_data thì làm thế nào?
evals.expected_output: Agent asks if the code is backed up or committed to git before running any migration scripts.

assertions.name: Backup Verification
assertions.description: Ensures the agent asks the user to confirm a backup exists.

evals.prompt: Can you help me migrate this script that uses the old Finance class to the new Unified UI?
evals.expected_output: Agent maps the legacy Finance class to the appropriate Unified UI layer (Fundamental).

assertions.name: Unified UI Mapping
assertions.description: Verifies the agent correctly translates legacy classes to the 7 Unified UI Layers.
